description: Fragment of a court record (upper left corner). Dated: Thursday, 4 Ṭevet 1453 Seleucid = 4 December 1141 CE. In which Bishr b. Ibrāhīm sues Zayn concerning items in the estate of his deceased paternal uncle, Ṣadaqa b. Khalaf. The items include safflower (ʿuṣfur) and indigo (nīl). Also mentions ʿAmīd al-Dawla. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
